metadata.name: get
metadata.description: Read a cel value by key.

metadata.name: set
metadata.description: Write a value to a cel and propagate the cascade.

metadata.name: update
metadata.description: Read-transform-write a cel; sugar for set(key, fn(get(key))).

metadata.name: batch
metadata.description: Write many cels then cascade once over the union of their downstreams.

metadata.name: getCel
metadata.description: Read the full {v, f, l} triple of a cel.

metadata.name: setCel
metadata.description: Atomically write a cel's {v, f, l} triple; re-precomputes if topology shifted.

metadata.name: getCelBatch
metadata.description: Read the full triple for many cels.

metadata.name: setCelBatch
metadata.description: Atomically write many cels' triples; one precompute at the end if any topology shifted.

metadata.name: touch
metadata.description: Fire dynamicCascade with no seeded changes — refresh clocks/randoms.

metadata.name: consume
metadata.description: Same shape as touch; semantic alias for 'observe and drain'.

metadata.name: drain
metadata.description: Flush channels to fixed point without writing any cels.

metadata.name: registerLambda
metadata.description: Install a fn (or compile one from source) at a key, with optional metadata and dispose.

metadata.name: clearErrors
metadata.description: Empty the state-level CelError log. Host calls this before retrying a failed hydrate or after surfacing errors to the user; the kernel never auto-clears.

metadata.name: f
metadata.description: Compile a formula source string to a runtime Fn. Default S-expression compiler; hosts swap formula languages by replacing this.
